summary: Closed branch 3 by consistency delta after alpha.15; free-dialogue extraction now preserves candidate outputs/templates and routes terminal points into shared terminal output binding + template/mock-example verification.
changes: Confirmed prior free-dialogue mechanics without rewalking the branch from scratch.

Added candidate_output_artifact_catalog, candidate_template_hints, output_related_open_questions, free_dialogue_candidate_output_policy, and free_dialogue_terminal_output_binding_policy to contract/state.
Updated free-dialogue structured extraction to keep candidate outputs/templates and explicit known/partial/AI-proposed/deferred/absent output policy.
Updated free-dialogue draft tree summary to mark terminal_output_binding_points and use shared terminal output binding/template/mock review.
Kept full validation / handoff as shared tail; no duplicated downstream nodes.
notes: This is a scoped consistency patch, not a full package redesign.
Full tests/coverage/validate-state/next-step/validate-factory-output/repo-check remain part of shared terminal/pre-handoff validation.
